title: SiTime Full Year 2024 Earnings - Revenues Beat, EPS Lags
text: For full year 2024, SiTime reported revenue of US$202.7m, up 41% from FY 2023. For FY 2024, SiTime reported a loss of US$4.05 per share, which further deteriorated from a US$3.63 loss in FY 2023. Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 2.0%, but earnings per share missed analyst estimates by 5.7%. Looking ahead from February 2025, revenue is forecast to grow 21% per year on average during the next 3 years, compared to a 17% growth forecast for the Semiconductor industry in the US. SITM's forecast earnings growth of 27.6% per year is above the savings rate of 2.1%, and SITM's earnings are forecast to grow faster than the US market at 14.2% per year.
